rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §252.006 governs filing of campaign treasurer appointments for specific-purpose committees. The two provisions are unrelated and do not conflict.
quote: A specific-purpose committee for supporting or opposing a candidate or assisting an officeholder must file its campaign treasurer appointment with the same authority as the appointment for candidacy for the office.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
